_note: Snapshot of the SyncView Calendar — Generate Caption workflow (id rNrRCwKPGuau7sLH) taken 2026-06-12, BEFORE adding caption-job tracking (caption_jobs data table, stage updates, cancel checks, error responses). Secrets are redacted in this copy: restore real values from the n8n credential/workflow if ever re-importing — [REDACTED-APIFY-TOKEN] in 'Run Apify Scraper' url, [REDACTED-ANTHROPIC-KEY] in 'Generate Caption with Claude' jsCode. n8n cloud's own workflow version history is the authoritative rollback path.
name: SyncView Calendar — Generate Caption
description: Generate Caption: Frame.io scrape -> submit Replicate prediction with webhook -> Wait for Replicate callback (max 8 min) -> Claude -> sheet. Replaces 60s wait that timed out on cold-start.

parameters.content:
## Generate Caption (Frame.io -> Replicate Whisper -> Claude -> Sheet)

POST /webhook/generate-caption
Body: { client, postId, assetUrl, captionPrompt? }

Replicate prediction is submitted with webhook: $execution.resumeUrl. The Wait node pauses until Replicate POSTs back the completed prediction (max 8 min). Replaces the Prefer: wait=60 pattern that timed out on 29 MB videos with cold-start Whisper.

parameters._jsCodeNote: Verbatim original code for this node is preserved unmodified inside the post-change version of the workflow (the 2026-06-12 change only prepends jobId parsing + duplicate-run guard + job-row creation after the validation block, and adds jobId to the returned json). See the live workflow or n8n version history for the exact original string.
parameters.jsCode: // (original Frame.io scrape-input builder — body parsing, validation, injected fetch/XHR interceptor, pageFunction picking the best assets.frame.io media URL, Apify actorInput assembly; returns { client, postId, assetUrl, captionPrompt, actorInput })

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ version: '4d50797290df275329f202e48c76360b3f22b08d28c196cbc54600319435f8d2', input: { audio: $json.mediaUrl, model: 'large-v3', transcription: 'plain text' }, webhook: $execution.resumeUrl, webhook_events_filter: ['completed'] }) }}

parameters._jsCodeNote: Verbatim original preserved unmodified inside the post-change workflow (the change only wraps it with a cancel check up front). Anthropic API key redacted here.
parameters.jsCode: // (original Claude caption writer — builds the prompt from the per-client captionPrompt or the baked-in DEFAULT_PROMPT, appends the transcript, calls api.anthropic.com/v1/messages with x-api-key [REDACTED-ANTHROPIC-KEY], model claude-sonnet-4-6, returns { ok, client, postId, caption, usedDefaultPrompt })
